headline: Top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index during Thursday's after-hours session.
summary: As the regular session of the US market on Thursday comes to an end, let's delve into the after-hours session and discover the top S&P500 gainers and losers shaping the post-market sentiment.

headline: Stocks Rebound Amid News of a US-Iran Deal

headline: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on Microchip, NXP, and ON Semi
summary: Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders, today launched three new leveraged ETFs on single stocks.  The Cboe-listed funds seek to deliver two times long (200%) the daily performance of a specific underlying stock.  All three ETFs are first-to-market strategies.

headline: Assessing NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Month Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance context NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) has drawn investor attention after a strong stock move, with returns of about 39% over the past month and 42% over the past 3 months, which have outpaced its recent 1 day decline. See our latest analysis for NXP Semiconductors.
